'''鈭歯-m-dh''' ('''kanamadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jawbone|jawbone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-m-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jawbone|jawbone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-m-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kanamadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinamadh|thinamadh]] || [[word:jinamadh|jinamadh]] || [[word:shinamadh|shinamadh]] || [[word:kinamadh|kinamadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunamadh|thuthunamadh]] || [[word:jujunamadh|jujunamadh]] || [[word:shushunamadh|shushunamadh]] || [[word:kukunamadh|kukunamadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunamadh|thunamadh]] || [[word:junamadh|junamadh]] || [[word:shunamadh|shunamadh]] || [[word:kunamadh|kunamadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunamadh|thunamadh]] || [[word:junamadh|junamadh]] || [[word:shunamadh|shunamadh]] || [[word:kunamadh|kunamadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenamadh|thenamadh]] || [[word:jenamadh|jenamadh]] || [[word:shenamadh|shenamadh]] || [[word:kenamadh|kenamadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonamadh|thothonamadh]] || [[word:jojonamadh|jojonamadh]] || [[word:shoshonamadh|shoshonamadh]] || [[word:kokonamadh|kokonamadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonamadh|thonamadh]] || [[word:jonamadh|jonamadh]] || [[word:shonamadh|shonamadh]] || [[word:konamadh|konamadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonamadh|thonamadh]] || [[word:jonamadh|jonamadh]] || [[word:shonamadh|shonamadh]] || [[word:konamadh|konamadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙namadh|th忙namadh]] || [[word:j忙namadh|j忙namadh]] || [[word:sh忙namadh|sh忙namadh]] || [[word:k忙namadh|k忙namadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanamadh|thathanamadh]] || [[word:jajanamadh|jajanamadh]] || [[word:shashanamadh|shashanamadh]] || [[word:kakanamadh|kakanamadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanamadh|thanamadh]] || [[word:janamadh|janamadh]] || [[word:shanamadh|shanamadh]] || [[word:kanamadh|kanamadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanamadh|thanamadh]] || [[word:janamadh|janamadh]] || [[word:shanamadh|shanamadh]] || [[word:kanamadh|kanamadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanamadh|shanamadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanamadh|goshanamadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanamadh|gokishanamadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanamadhn眉|shanamadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkn眉|goshanamadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanamadhn眉|gokishanamadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanamadhsh毛|shanamadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanamadhnksh毛|goshanamadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanamadhsh毛|gokishanamadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanamadhro|shanamadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkro|goshanamadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanamadhro|gokishanamadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanamadhmu|shanamadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkmu|goshanamadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanamadhmu|gokishanamadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanamadhsher|shanamadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanamadhnksher|goshanamadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanamadhsher|gokishanamadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanamadhng|shanamadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkng|goshanamadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanamadhng|gokishanamadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanamadhya|shanamadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkya|goshanamadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanamadhya|gokishanamadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanamadhyam|shanamadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkyam|goshanamadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanamadhyam|gokishanamadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanamadhn眉sh毛|shanamadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkn眉sh毛|goshanamadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanamadhn眉sh毛|gokishanamadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanamadhn眉ro|shanamadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkn眉ro|goshanamadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanamadhn眉ro|gokishanamadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanamadhn眉mu|shanamadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkn眉mu|goshanamadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanamadhn眉mu|gokishanamadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanamadhsh毛n眉|shanamadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanamadhnksh毛n眉|goshanamadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanamadhsh毛n眉|gokishanamadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanamadhsh毛ro|shanamadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanamadhnksh毛ro|goshanamadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanamadhsh毛ro|gokishanamadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanamadhsh毛mu|shanamadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanamadhnksh毛mu|goshanamadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanamadhsh毛mu|gokishanamadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanamadhron眉|shanamadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkron眉|goshanamadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanamadhron眉|gokishanamadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanamadhrosh毛|shanamadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkrosh毛|goshanamadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanamadhrosh毛|gokishanamadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanamadhromu|shanamadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkromu|goshanamadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanamadhromu|gokishanamadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanamadhmun眉|shanamadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkmun眉|goshanamadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanamadhmun眉|gokishanamadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanamadhmush毛|shanamadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkmush毛|goshanamadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanamadhmush毛|gokishanamadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanamadhmuro|shanamadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanamadhnkmuro|goshanamadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanamadhmuro|gokishanamadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
